Incident.short_description: Having problems with Sales Tools performance
Incident.description: Pages are taking more time to load than normal.

Incident.short_description: Need access to sales DB for the West
Incident.description: I have to analyze all US data in the SFA system, but am unable to get to see the data from the west coast.

Incident.short_description: How do I create a sub-folder
Incident.description: I need to organize my inbox in my email program. However I can't create a sub-folder. I didn't seen an option to create a new folder when right clicking.

Incident.short_description: SAP Materials Management is slow or there is an outage
Incident.description: Nothing loads in the application. Is there an outage?

Incident.short_description: Unable to access team file share
Incident.description: I can access my personal folder but can't access my team's folder on our file share.

Incident.short_description: Performance problems with wifi
Incident.description: Wifi connection seems slow. Webpages are taking a very long time to load.

Incident.short_description: Performance problems with email
Incident.description: Taking a really long time to send emails. Last email took almost a minute for sending to complete and there wasn't even an attachment.

Incident.short_description: Email server is down.
Incident.description: Unable to send or receive emails.

Incident.short_description: Need access to the common drive.
Incident.description: Need access to the common drive for sharing files which can be accessed by all members. Please provide access.

Incident.short_description: Unable to access the shared folder.
Incident.description: Unable to access the shared folder. Please provide access.

Incident.short_description: Unable to post content on a Wiki page
Incident.description: I am not able to edit a wiki page.

Incident.short_description: Cannot sign into the company portal app
Incident.description: Having an issue with users trying to access the company portal app
Incident.close_notes: Reinstalled the app

Incident.short_description: ATF : Test1
Assessment :  ATF Assessor
Unable to access the personal details section in payroll portal
Incident.description: Unable to access the personal details section in payroll portal

Incident.short_description: ATF:TEST2
Can't access SFA software
Incident.description: Unable to login to SFA even though login credentials are correct.

Incident.short_description: SAP Financial Accounting application appears to be down
Incident.description: Main menu doesn't load when I open the SAP Financial Accounting application.

Incident.short_description: SAP Sales app is not accessible
Incident.description: Unable to get into the SAP Sales app. It was working yesterday.

Incident.short_description: Sales forecast spreadsheet is READ ONLY
Incident.description: Were the permissions on the sales forecast spreadsheet changed recently? They were editable last week but are read only today. Can someone update the permissions to make the spreadsheet editable again? We need to update the spreadsheet ASAP.

Incident.short_description: Trouble getting to Oregon mail server
Incident.description: Unable to access Oregon mail server. Is it down?

Incident.short_description: Manager can't access SAP Controlling application
Incident.description: Was able to access SAP Controlling application last week but doesn't seem to be working as of today. Is there an outage?

Incident.short_description: The SAP HR application is not accessible
Incident.description: I've been trying to access the SAP HR application for the last few hours. Each time I go into the application, nothing loads.

Incident.short_description: Need help with Remedy. Can we configure UI?
Incident.description: Need to adjust layout of UI, add additional fields, and remove a few buttons. We are missing some critical fields that need to get added immediately.

Incident.short_description: Need to add more memory to laptop
Incident.description: I have a project involving video editing to complete. I've installed the editing software and the memory in my laptop is insufficient to run it effectively.

Incident.short_description: I need a replacement iPhone, please
Incident.description: I lost my work-issued iPhone 7 while traveling last week and need a replacement device. I've erased the phone remotely and have called my carrier to shut off service to it.

Incident.short_description: Can't launch 64-bit Windows 7 virtual machine
Incident.description: I downloaded and installed 64-bit Windows 7 virtual machine and I can't get it to launch. I'm not sure if I need 64-bit or 32-bit.

Incident.short_description: JavaScript error on hiring page of corporate website
Incident.description: Seeing JavaScript error message on hiring page on Explorer and Firefox.

Incident.short_description: Can't access Exchange server - is it down?
Incident.description: Can't connect to Exchange. Login credentials and network connection are working though.

Incident.short_description: I can't launch my VPN client since the last software update
Incident.description: There was a software update two days ago and now my VPN doesn't work. Nothing loads when I click on the VPN client icon on my desktop.

Incident.short_description: I can't get my weather report
Incident.description: WeatherBug icon has disappeared from my desktop. Unable to get my weather report.

Incident.short_description: Network file shares access issue
Incident.description: User can't get to any of his files on the file server.

Incident.short_description: Wireless access is down in my area
Incident.description: I just moved from floor 2 to floor 3 and my laptop cannot connect to any wireless network.

Incident.short_description: Rain is leaking on main DNS Server
Incident.description: Seeing puddles of water on the floor of the server room. We've put buckets out to collect the water until this is fixed.

Incident.short_description: Request for a new service
Incident.description: Need to place order for a new machine. Will need help with installation also.

Incident.short_description: Issue with email
Incident.description: Can't connect to email from my laptop.

Incident.short_description: Can't log into SAP from my laptop today
Incident.description: Tried to connect to SAP and all I see is a "Connecting…." message but nothing else happens.

Incident.short_description: My desk phone does not work
Incident.description: Unable to dial out or receive calls. Phone is plugged in but there's no dial tone.

Incident.short_description: Please remove the latest hotfix from my PC
Incident.description: The hotfix was installed on my PC and now some of my applications have stopped working. Can I roll back to the previous version?

Incident.short_description: Network storage unavailable
Incident.description: Receiving error message with "network path not found."

Incident.short_description: Does not look like a backup occurred last night
Incident.description: Last automated backup occurred two nights ago. Did we change automated backup schedule?
Incident.close_notes: asdasdasdsad

Incident.short_description: EMAIL is slow when an attachment is involved
Incident.description: Noticing today that any time I send an email with an attachment, it takes at least 20 seconds to send. This happens regardless of the attachment size.
Incident.close_notes: Gave workaround

Incident.short_description: New employee hire
Incident.description: We have a new hire starting on Monday. She will need to be set up with a desk, laptop, phone, email account, and systems access.
Incident.close_notes: Closed before close notes were made mandatory

Incident.short_description: Customer didn't receive eFax
Incident.description: I tried sending a fax to a customer through the eFax online portal and also via email. My customer did not receive the fax in both instances. I don't know if this is an issue on our side with transmission or on my customer's side.
Incident.close_notes: Closed before close notes were made mandatory

Incident.short_description: Need new Blackberry set up
Incident.description: I'm replacing my old phone with a Blackberry and require assistance to get it set up. I'd like to get the files and contacts transferred to the new phone and need help getting the two factor authentication app set up on it.
Incident.close_notes: Closed before close notes were made mandatory

Incident.short_description: my PDF docs are all locked from editing
Incident.description: Unable to edit any PDFs in Acrobat. All my PDFs are read only now. How do I unlock them?
Incident.close_notes: Closed before close notes were made mandatory

Incident.short_description: Issue with networking
Incident.description: Experiencing connection issues. Unable to create connection to data source.
Incident.close_notes: Closed before close notes were made mandatory

Incident.short_description: File Server is 80% full - Needs upgrade
Incident.description: 2tb file server has less than 400gb free.
Incident.close_notes: Closed before close notes were made mandatory

Incident.short_description: My disk is still having issues. Can't delete a file
Incident.description: Hard drive is still making grinding and clicking noises and now I can't delete a file. I've tried to delete it 3 times.
Incident.close_notes: Closed before close notes were made mandatory

Incident.short_description: Seem to have an issue with my hard drive...
Incident.description: Hard drive has been making a loud grinding noise for the last two days.
Incident.close_notes: Closed before close notes were made mandatory

Incident.short_description: Lost connection to the wireless network
Incident.description: Can't connect to wifi. Keep getting "unable to join network" message.
Incident.close_notes: Closed before close notes were made mandatory

Incident.short_description: Issue with a web page on wiki
Incident.description: The landing page for our internal wiki isn't loading. I've refreshed it multiple times and it keeps timing out.
Incident.close_notes: Closed before close notes were made mandatory

Incident.short_description: EMAIL Server Down Again
Incident.description: Multiple employees have reported that they are unable to send/receive email.
Incident.close_notes: Closed before close notes were made mandatory

Incident.short_description: Hangs when trying to print VISIO document
Incident.description: When I try to print VISIO, my whole computer just freezes and stops working.
Incident.close_notes: Closed before close notes were made mandatory

Incident.short_description: Printer in my office is out of toner
Incident.description: Where do I find toner for the HP 950C I have?
Incident.close_notes: Closed before close notes were made mandatory

Incident.short_description: Reset my password
Incident.description: I can't remember my password and need to log in. Can someone reset my password asap? I am blocked on several urgent items until I can log in again.
Incident.close_notes: Closed before close notes were made mandatory

Incident.short_description: Can't read email
Incident.description: User can't access email on mail.company.com.
Incident.close_notes: Closed before close notes were made mandatory

Incident.short_description: Reset my password
Incident.description: Forgot password and unable to log in. Can you reset or resend my password?
Incident.close_notes: Closed before close notes were made mandatory

Incident.short_description: Forgot email password
Incident.description: User forgot their email password.
Incident.close_notes: Walked him through settng his password, again.

Incident.short_description: Need Oracle 10GR2 installed
Incident.description: Currently running 10GR1 and need to upgrade to 10GR2.
Incident.close_notes: Closed before close notes were made mandatory

Incident.short_description: Employee payroll application server is down.
Incident.description: Employee payroll application server is down.Not able to login with valid credentials.

Incident.short_description: My computer is not detecting the headphone device
Incident.description: My computer is not detecting the headphone device. It could be an issue with the USB port.
Incident.close_notes: This is not an issue with the USB port. Replaced the headset to resolve the issue.

Incident.short_description: Defect tracking tool is down.
Incident.description: While launching the defect tracking base URL, it is redirecting to an error page.
Incident.close_notes: Reverted to a previous version.

Incident.short_description: Missing my home directory
Incident.description: Logged in and didn't see my home directory. Logged out and back in again and it's still not appearing. I'm completely blocked until this is resolved.
Incident.close_notes: Done

Incident.short_description: CPU load high for over 10 minutes
Incident.description: Watcher daemon detected that the CPU was 100% busy for more than 10 minutes
Incident.close_notes: Fixed

Incident.short_description: The USB port on my PC stopped working
Incident.close_notes: As this is intermittent. Restarting the PC fixes this.

Incident.short_description: Nango dryrun test incident
Nango dryrun test incident
Nango dryrun test incident
Nango dryrun test incident
Nango dryrun test incident
Nango dryrun test incident
Unable to connect to email
Incident.description: I am unable to connect to the email server. It appears to be down.
Incident.close_notes: This incident is resolved.

headers.content-security-policy-report-only: default-src 'self' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://connect.nango.dev;child-src 'self';connect-src 'self' https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.sentry.io https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev wss://api.nango.dev/ https://connect.nango.dev https://*.posthog.com https://*.stripe.com https://*.plain.com wss://*.plain.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com;font-src 'self' data: https://*.googleapis.com https://*.gstatic.com https://*.cdn-plain.com;frame-src 'self' https://accounts.google.com https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://connect.nango.dev https://www.youtube.com https://*.stripe.com;img-src 'self' data: blob: https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.posthog.com https://img.logo.dev https://*.ytimg.com https://*.plain.com;manifest-src 'self';media-src 'self';object-src 'self';script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.stripe.com https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.googleapis.com https://apis.google.com https://*.posthog.com https://www.youtube.com https://*.cdn-plain.com;style-src blob: 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.googleapis.com https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev;worker-src blob: 'self' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.googleapis.com https://*.posthog.com;base-uri 'self';form-action 'self';frame-ancestors 'self';script-src-attr 'none';upgrade-insecure-requests
headers.access-control-expose-headers: Authorization, Etag, Content-Type, Content-Length, X-Nango-Signature, X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset
